title: Billing migration integration test failing
description: The billing-service schema migration 004 fails the integration test suite intermittently on the orders join. This is blocking release v2.4. Migration commit reverted to keep main green until fixed.

title: Add nightly backfill job to data-pipeline
description: Add a nightly backfill that recomputes historical aggregates. Note: opens many DB connections; needs its own pool.

title: Checkout latency incident follow-up
description: Follow-up actions from INC-87: isolate data-pipeline connections and add connection-pool saturation alerts for the billing database.

title: Auth rate limiting for Reporting v2
description: Reporting v2 needs per-tenant API rate limiting in auth-service before it can launch. Work in progress; this is the current blocker for the Reporting v2 milestone.

title: Reporting v2 milestone
description: Tracking milestone for Reporting v2. Blocked by NIM-455 (auth rate limiting). Cannot proceed until rate limiting lands.
